detail.instructions: Implement available_names with filter_map. Include an item name only when quantity is greater than reserved.

hints.body: available stock is quantity minus reserved, but compare before subtracting.
filter_map can return Some(name) for included items and None for skipped items.
Borrow names with as_str instead of cloning them.

detail.completionExplanation: filter_map fits this helper because filtering and mapping happen together. It keeps the output borrowed from the input slice instead of allocating new strings.
